title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
description: A beginner-friendly course covering neural networks, computer vision, and natural language processing with real-world African use cases.

title: Solar Engineering for African Climates
description: Design and deploy solar systems optimized for equatorial, arid, and tropical environments across the continent.

title: Robotics Fundamentals
description: Build and program autonomous robots using affordable hardware. Covers kinematics, sensor fusion, and ROS2.

title: Smart Grid Design & Management
description: Learn to architect decentralized micro-grids, implement load balancing algorithms, and integrate renewable sources.

title: Drone Technology & Aerial Robotics
description: From flight dynamics to autonomous navigation — master the full stack of modern drone development.

title: AI in Healthcare for Emerging Markets
description: Build diagnostic AI models that work with limited data, intermittent connectivity, and diverse patient populations.
